# Markov Chain Studio

> Free online interactive Markov chain solver and simulator for finite discrete-time Markov chains.

Canonical URL: https://markov-chains-solver.vercel.app/
Source repository: https://github.com/rpippp/markov-chains-solver

## What It Does

- Visual Markov chain graph editing with states, directed edges, and transition probabilities.
- Exact calculations for hitting probabilities, expected hitting times, stationary distributions, and state classification.
- Animated random walk simulation and Monte Carlo estimates for validating exact answers.
- Transition matrix editing plus CSV and LaTeX export.
- Single dependency-free HTML application that runs locally in any modern browser.

## Useful Search Queries

- markov chain solver
- markov chain calculator
- stationary distribution calculator
- hitting probability calculator
- expected hitting time Markov chain
- absorbing Markov chain calculator
- transition matrix calculator
